name: Team Bucciarati
description:
If one day death comes, I don't want to go to hell or heaven. I want to go to a paradise where only Bucciarati exists. Just thinking about such a perfect place brings tears to my face. May the father of us all rest well in paradise. 😢😭😭

You are a monster Araki, you killed what we can call perfection. Bucciarati will always remain in the hearts of all of us, even after death we will remember the one who gave birth to all who are alive at this moment and in another moment. Thank you for everything Bucciarati, words cannot describe your perfection...

Now seriously I just wanted to say thank you to everyone who uses my bots and I hope you are happy.
creator: VERSTAPPEN
